narrative:
Hamilton Twp B (precinct in Warren County) has 1,103 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.2 percentage points.
